message:
Add native regex fallback when ripgrep is absent

When rg is not in PATH, Grep now falls back to grepNative which uses
Go's regexp + filepath.WalkDir. Skips hidden dirs/files, binary files,
supports case-insensitive search, glob filtering, and max result limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
